commandsRun: pnpm --filter @cdp/web test:e2e automation-builder automation-node-editors automation-publish-gate broadcast-and-automation
result.e2eSummary: Playwright SOLO (cdp_e2e, :8788/:5174), ONE invocation at a time. New specs 9/9 pass (automation-list-detail 6, automation-lifecycle 2, automation-journey-smoke 1). Existing automation + broadcast specs 33/33 pass (automation-builder, automation-node-editors, automation-publish-gate, broadcast-and-automation — updated openAutomations helpers + back-to-list nav for the split). Segment + login-workspace-switch specs 14/14 pass (no regression from the kit toneFor + seed enrollment additions).
result.notes: Phase 7 complete, test-first. A) List/detail split: AutomationBuilder.tsx now exports AutomationsList (#/automations, list-only — Design email button REMOVED) + AutomationDetail (#/automations/new|/:id, the canvas builder moved verbatim, with a automations-back button); AppShell screenFor routes accordingly; editorReturn flow lands on the detail page naturally (URL carries the id). B) Lifecycle: pure nextLifecycle + automationCountsShape + isEnrollableAutomationStatus added to automation-runner core.ts (exported via index.ts); POST /automations/:id/{pause,resume,archive} (manage_content, scopedQuery, 404 cross-ws, typed 409); GET /automations returns status + per-automation counts via one workspace-scoped GROUP BY; runner pause gate reads automations.status inside the locked tick (both tx + legacy CAS paths) so a paused automation's due enrollment is parked, not advanced (FOR UPDATE/CAS/idempotency preserved). toneFor handles paused(warn)/archived(neutral). C) Full journey acceptance test composes live-event-enroll (createApp POST /profiles/:id/events) + manual + segment enroll, injected-clock advance through wait/hour-window/if/set_attribute/send/webhook/exit, real Dispatcher send (SES mocked) -> messages_log(automation_id), injected webhook (allowlist/SSRF/secret-decrypt), idempotent re-tick, WS_B untouched. NO migration (automations.status already free-text). Version 0.36.0; CLAUDE.md updated. NOT pushed. Lint shows only the pre-existing known-7 react-hooks/exhaustive-deps 'rule not found' errors (no new errors introduced).
result.testSummary: Full Vitest GREEN: turbo `pnpm test` 43/43 tasks pass. automation-runner 172/172 (incl. new paused-automation-not-advanced + updated in-memory orchestrator mock to carry automations.status); local-api 214/214 (incl. new automation-lifecycle 5/5, automation-enrollment-counts 2/2, automation-journey-live-enroll 2/2). No regression across segments/web/db/email/etc.
